name: HMS Jasper (ii) (J 407)
events: 8 Dec 1944 HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Vancouver (T/Lt. G.C. Campbell, RCNVR), HMCS Rosthern (T/Lt. R.F. Wilson, RCNVR) and HMS Jasper (T/Cdr. J.S. Roe, DSC, RNVR). (1)

27 Feb 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Knaresborough Castle (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J.F. Marchant, RNR) and HMS Seychelles (A/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Baldwin-Wiseman, RD, RNR) and later with HMS Jasper (Lt. J.N. Kempton, RN) and HMS Sealyham (A/Ch.Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (2)
28 Feb 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Seychelles (A/Lt.Cdr. R.E. Baldwin-Wiseman, RD, RNR) and HMS Jasper (Lt. J.N. Kempton, RN). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
